creator: kryol@bigmir.net
text:
Due to a bug, the download report only showed the host name instead of the
full url as it used to do prior to version 2.3.2.

Developers fixed this problem. There is a patch:
http://sarg.git.sourceforge.net/git/gitweb.cgi?p=sarg/sarg;a=commit;h=24eb624ea44bf4c82c602cea2195d85558787b47

But this patch not yet implemented in FreeBSD ports tree

Fix: 

Developers fixed this problem. There is a patch:
http://sarg.git.sourceforge.net/git/gitweb.cgi?p=sarg/sarg;a=commit;h=24eb624ea44bf4c82c602cea2195d85558787b47

But this patch not yet implemented in FreeBSD ports tree
